Notes: Focused review: pdfe renders all expected content. The RGB Adobe APP14 DCT fix removed the severe green cast; remaining differences are line-density and antialias fidelity against the Ghostscript target.

Target.Reason: Ghostscript preserves the architectural linework with the strongest grayscale line-density while keeping the colored safety overlays; pdfe is now color-correct but still lighter/noisier in fine raster linework.

1.QualityReason: pdfe renders the full drawing and annotations, but fine linework raster fidelity remains below the Ghostscript target and is still an improvement candidate.
1.Notes: Reviewed against current pdfe, MuPDF, Cairo, and Ghostscript renders after the DCT color-transform fix; do not count as pixel-perfect or accepted-reference match.
